description: 目標語系閱讀層任務包：Reading comprehension architecture（literal/inferential/discourse）

tasks.desc: Define reading layer contract (pre-read/while-read/post-read) and how it plugs into unit_blueprint sequence (spec: TLG-013).
Define text profile schema (genre, length, lexical coverage, syntax density, discourse markers).
Define reading skill targets by level: gist/detail/inference/reference/cohesion/evaluation.
Define question blueprint schema (literal, inferential, evaluative, structure) with accepted answer policy.
Define evidence mapping contract: each question must map to evidence span(s) in source text.
Define reading rubric profile and thresholds for A1/A2 (then B1+ extension hooks) (spec: TLG-014).
Add TLG-005 generator input extension for reading nodes and rubric payload contract (schema: tlg005_reading_generator_input_v1).
Implement TLG-006 gate rules for reading (missing evidence span, question-text mismatch, weak distractors).
Pilot on KO A1/A2: 2 units with full reading flow and QA defect report.
Freeze recommendation for reading layer: stable contract fields vs deferred advanced features.
